title: Guide on Ethics Appraisal Procedure in Horizon Europe
author: University of Ljubljana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This guide is meant as an aid for researchers planning to submit their research project proposal for EU funding in understanding the process of ethics appraisal procedure. 
 It covers the following aspects: 
 
 Ethics appraisal procedure – A brief overview 
 Ethics self-assessment during the preparation of the project proposal 
 Initial ethics review procedure of the project proposal 
 Mechanisms to ensure ethics compliance throughout the project's duration
